sourcesContent:
const dashboardItems = (role) => [
  { type: 'section', label: 'Dashboard' },
  { path: '/dashboard', label: 'Dashboard', icon: 'dashboard', desc: role === 'technician' ? 'Assigned work overview' : 'Operational KPIs' },
  ...(['coordinator', 'manager', 'administrator'].includes(role)
    ? [
      { path: '/dashboard/performance', label: 'Performance', icon: 'performance', desc: 'Lead time and productivity KPIs' },
      { path: '/dashboard/costs', label: 'Costs', icon: 'reports', desc: 'Financial cost analysis' },
    ]
    : []),
  ...(['manager', 'administrator'].includes(role)
    ? [{ path: '/dashboard/management', label: 'Management', icon: 'management', desc: 'Strategic dashboard' }]
    : []),
];

const requestItems = (role) => [
  { type: 'section', label: 'Requests' },
  { path: '/requests', label: role === 'requester' ? 'My Requests' : 'Requests', icon: 'requests', desc: role === 'technician' ? 'Assigned requests' : 'Request workflow' },
  ...(['requester', 'coordinator', 'administrator'].includes(role)
    ? [{ path: '/requests/new', label: 'New Request', icon: 'new', desc: 'Create a request' }]
    : []),
];

const planningItems = [
  { type: 'section', label: 'Planning' },
  { path: '/planning', label: 'Production Planning', icon: 'planning', desc: 'Planning KPIs and request schedule' },
];

const resourceItems = (role) => [
  { type: 'section', label: 'Resources' },
  ...(['coordinator', 'manager', 'administrator'].includes(role)
    ? [
      { path: '/dashboard/resources', label: 'Resource Dashboard', icon: 'resource', desc: 'Resource capacity overview' },
      { path: '/stock', label: 'Stock', icon: 'resource', desc: 'Material stock management' },
    ]
    : []),
];

const reportItems = [
  { type: 'section', label: 'Reports' },
  { path: '/reports/requests', label: 'Export Requests', icon: 'reports', desc: 'Request exports' },
  { path: '/reports/workload', label: 'Export Workload', icon: 'reports', desc: 'Technician and printer workload exports' },
  { path: '/reports/materials', label: 'Export Materials', icon: 'reports', desc: 'Material consumption exports' },
  { path: '/reports/kpis', label: 'Export KPIs', icon: 'reports', desc: 'KPI history exports' },
  { path: '/reports/cost', label: 'Export Cost', icon: 'reports', desc: 'Financial cost exports' },
  { path: '/reports/archive', label: 'Export Archive', icon: 'archive', desc: 'Historical archive exports' },
];

const administrationItems = (role) => [
  { type: 'section', label: 'Administration' },
  ...(['coordinator', 'manager', 'administrator'].includes(role)
    ? [{ path: '/archive', label: 'Application Archive', icon: 'archive', desc: 'Historical requests' }]
    : []),
  ...(['coordinator', 'administrator'].includes(role)
    ? [{ path: '/archive/monday-import', label: 'Monday.com Import', icon: 'admin', desc: 'Import historical Monday.com records' }]
    : []),
  ...(role === 'administrator'
    ? [{ path: '/admin', label: 'Administration', icon: 'admin', desc: 'System administration', children: ['Users', 'Printers', 'Materials', 'Sites', 'Monday.com Import'] }]
    : []),
];

export const ROLE_NAV_ITEMS = {
  requester: [
    ...requestItems('requester'),
  ],
  technician: [
    ...dashboardItems('technician'),
    ...requestItems('technician'),
    ...planningItems,
  ],
  coordinator: [
    ...dashboardItems('coordinator'),
    ...requestItems('coordinator'),
    ...planningItems,
    ...resourceItems('coordinator'),
    ...reportItems,
    ...administrationItems('coordinator'),
  ],
  manager: [
    ...dashboardItems('manager'),
    ...requestItems('manager'),
    ...planningItems,
    ...resourceItems('manager'),
    ...reportItems,
    ...administrationItems('manager'),
  ],
  administrator: [
    ...dashboardItems('administrator'),
    ...requestItems('administrator'),
    ...planningItems,
    ...resourceItems('administrator'),
    ...reportItems,
    ...administrationItems('administrator'),
  ],
};

export const UTILITY_NAV_ITEMS = [
  { path: '/onboarding', label: 'Getting Started', icon: 'help', desc: 'Role guide and workflow help' },
  { path: '/notifications', label: 'Notifications', icon: 'bell', desc: 'System notifications' },
  { path: null, label: 'Profile', icon: 'profile', desc: 'Current user and department' },
];

export const getRoleNavItems = (role) => ROLE_NAV_ITEMS[role] || [];

export const getNavigationMapItems = (role) => [
  ...getRoleNavItems(role),
  ...UTILITY_NAV_ITEMS,
];
